LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D AND THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT WILL EXAMINE THE VALIDITY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE THAT WAS SUBMITTED IN OPEN COURT BY DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL. IF VALID THE COURT WILL GRANT DEFENDANTS EDDIE TSANG, WINNIE TSANG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED X-COMP. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. IF NOT VALID THE COURT WILL DENY THE MOTION FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558.
